text.title: Agent Eval Test-Set Curation Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-eval-test-set-curation is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Eval scores are great but production fails on edge cases.
antipattern.reason: Set is 100% synthetic; no real-trace fraction.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r1: ≥30% from production traces.

antipattern.description: Score drops 5% but team can't tell which capability regressed.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r2: 3 tags per trajectory.

antipattern.description: Golden set changed without anyone noticing; baseline drift.
antipattern.reason: No PR review on set changes.
